data.title: Cryptocurrency Arbitrum Falls More Than 3% In 24 hours
data.description: Arbitrum's (CRYPTO: ARB) price has decreased 3.33% over the past 24 hours to $0.56, continuing its downward trend over the past week of -0.0%, moving from $0.57 to its current price.

data.title: Winnebago Industries Q4 Results Miss Estimates, Stock Dips On Soft Outlook
data.description: Winnebago Industries' Q4 results miss estimates with adjusted EPS at 28 cents and earnings outlook softer than estimates for fiscal 2025, causing stock decline.

data.title: Safe Harbor Financial's $30M Deal In Jeopardy? What NASDAQ Investors Need To Know...Now
data.description: Safe Harbor faces a legal battle over its $30 million acquisition of Abaca, raising concerns in the cannabis banking sector.

data.title: Why ShiftPixy (PIXY) Stock Is Rising
data.description: ShiftPixy shares are trading higher by 11.7% during Wednesday's session. The company announced it signed a LOI to acquire TurboScale.
